3168300.name: A Tower
3168300.description:
A Tower is an engaging exploration adventure that invites players on a journey of self-discovery and mystery. You awaken within a colossal tower that reaches the skies, unaware of how you arrived there. Equipped with a Bubble-Blowing Staff, you'll traverse vast deserts and ancient ruins, seeking to unravel the secrets of this monumental structure and uncover your own identity. Along the way, you'll face intriguing challenges, collecting ethereal essences that will help reveal the truth about this world. With an immersive atmosphere, stunning visuals, and a captivating soundtrack, A Tower offers a unique experience of exploration and introspection.​

Key Features

  • Deep and Emotional Narrative: Experience a rich story that explores themes of identity, memory, and redemption, leading the player through a meaningful emotional journey.​

  • Living and Transforming World: In an Open World, explore breathtaking environments, from vast deserts to mysterious ruins, presented with a unique art direction that combines dark and beautiful elements. As you progress, you'll notice that behind this obscure atmosphere, there's a hidden beauty waiting to be discovered.​

  • Progressive Narrative: Uncover hidden secrets and collect ethereal essences that will reveal more about the protagonist's identity and the mysteries of the tower, encouraging continuous exploration.​

  • Bubble-Based Movement: Use the Bubble-Blowing Staff to create bubbles that allow you to navigate the environment in a fluid and dynamic way, providing a sense of freedom and discovery.​

  • Intriguing Challenges and Puzzles: Face enigmas that will test your intelligence and creativity, organically integrated into the game world, offering a rewarding experience.​

  • Atmospheric Soundtrack: Enjoy an engaging musical composition that complements the setting and intensifies the emotional experience of the journey.
3168300.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 保加利亚语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 韩语, 丹麦语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 芬兰语, 希腊语, 荷兰语, 匈牙利语, 印度尼西亚语, 日语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 瑞典语, 泰语, 捷克语, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语, 阿拉伯语
